tier_claimed.description: Tier family implemented by the active model.

tier_earned.description: Tier earned after the current checks and defaults.

tier_rationale.description: Short rationale for the current tier assignment.
tier_rationale.title: Tier Rationale

assumption_checks_passed.description: Whether the minimum checks for the earned tier passed.
assumption_checks_passed.title: Assumption Checks Passed

required_caveats.description: Caveats that should stay attached to interpretation of the result.
required_caveats.title: Required Caveats

forbidden_interpretations.description: Interpretations that the result must not support at the current tier.
forbidden_interpretations.title: Forbidden Interpretations
